zh.Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾艾斯哈姆 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Althea Eynsham於1405年7月20日出生在英國奧可福爾艾斯哈姆 霍爾時，她的父親Daniel Eynsham19歲，母親Mrs Daniel Eynsham16歲。她於1419年與Colonel Richard Lovelace在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年4月24日在英國肯特貝黑斯達享年42歲。

zh-hans.Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾艾斯哈姆 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Althea Eynsham于1405年7月20日出生在英国奧可福爾艾斯哈姆 霍爾时，她的父亲Daniel Eynsham19岁，母亲Mrs Daniel Eynsham16岁。她于1419年与Colonel Richard Lovelace在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年4月24日在英国肯特貝黑斯達享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Althea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek mythology. Although sometimes considered to be a contracted form of Alethea , it is actually a quite distinct name (Greek Althaia) of uncertain origin. It was borne in classical legend by the mother of Meleager, who was given a brand plucked from the fire at the instant of her son's birth, with the promise that his life would last as long as the brand did; some twenty years later she destroyed it in a fit of pique. The name was revived by the 17th‐century poet Richard Lovelace as a poetic pseudonym for his beloved.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Althea Eynsham was born on 20 July 1405, in Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Daniel Eynsham, was 19 and her mother, Mrs Daniel Eynsham, was 16. She married Colonel Richard Lovelace in 1419, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 April 1448, in Bethersden, Kent, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Althea Eynsham est née le 20 juillet 1405, à Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Daniel Eynsham, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs Daniel Eynsham, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Colonel Richard Lovelace en 1419, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1448, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Althea Eynsham am 20. Juli 1405 in Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Daniel Eynsham 19 und ihre Mutter Mrs Daniel Eynsham 16. Sie hat 1419 in London, England Colonel Richard Lovelace geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. April 1448 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Bethersden, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Althea Eynsham è nata il il 20 luglio 1405 nel Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Daniel Eynsham, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mrs Daniel Eynsham, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Colonel Richard Lovelace nel 1419, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1448, nel Bethersden, Kent, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Althea Eynshamが1405年7月20日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエインシャム ハルで生まれた時，父Daniel Eynshamは19歳，母Mrs Daniel Eynshamは16歳であった。1419年にイギリスロンドンでColonel Richard Lovelaceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年4月24日にイギリスケントベスエルスデンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Althea Eynsham(이)가 1405년 7월 20일 영국 스퍼드실르 이샤 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Daniel Eynsham(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Daniel Eynsham(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 런던에서 Colonel Richard Lovelace(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 4월 24일 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.20 July 1405–24 April 1448: 1405 оны Долоодугаар сарын 20–1448 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 24

pt.20 July 1405–24 April 1448: 20 de julho de 1405–24 de abril de 1448
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Althea Eynsham nasceu em 20 de julho de 1405, em Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Daniel Eynsham, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Daniel Eynsham, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Colonel Richard Lovelace em 1419, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1448, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Althea Eynsham родилась 20 июля 1405 г. в местности эиншам холл, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Daniel Eynsham было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Daniel Eynsham, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Colonel Richard Lovelace в 1419 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 апреля 1448 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.20 July 1405–24 April 1448: 20 de julio de 1405–24 de abril de 1448
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Althea Eynsham nació el 20 de julio de 1405, en Eynsham Hall, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Daniel Eynsham, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs Daniel Eynsham, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Colonel Richard Lovelace en 1419, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1448, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
